abstract: P2D helps AI coding agents stop guessing, map the system before they edit, and save tokens, time, and money. It moves agents from vibe coding to system-aware engineering with structural discovery, blast-radius analysis, surgical edit previews, deletion simulation, state ownership mapping, and recall-aware benchmarking. Includes lightweight runtime scripts, pinned external benchmark profiles, dev-only eval prompts, trigger evals, and blind A/B comparison guidance so savings are reported with recall, precision, false negatives, and false positives.
